name: Beef Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all visible fat from the meat and freeze until firm enough to slice into thin strips.
2. Cut across the grain, ensuring slices are as thin as possible (about 1/8 inch thick).
3. Cut slices into 1-inch-wide strips.
4. Arrange strips in a shallow baking pan.
5. Combine remaining ingredients and pour liquid over strips.
6. Refrigerate overnight or for at least 8 hours.
7. Preheat oven to 140°F.
8. Remove meat from marinade and place strips on a cake rack over a cookie sheet in the oven.
9. Dry until edges will splinter (18-24 hours).
10. Cool completely before wrapping lightly with plastic wrap.
11. Store in a closely covered container for up to 4 weeks.
